name: Chicken Marsala - Butter Busters^
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Marsala wine or red cooking wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to an even 1/4-inch thickness.
2. Beat Egg Beaters in a shallow dish.
3. Dredge each chicken breast in the egg beaters, then coat with crushed crackers.
4. Set aside.
5. In a nonstick skillet, cook minced garlic in chicken broth over medium heat for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
6. Add chicken to the skillet and cook, turning once, for 6 minutes or until done.
7. Transfer chicken to a serving platter and keep warm.
8. In the same skillet, add Marsala wine (or red cooking wine), bouillon cubes, pepper, and chopped parsley.
9. If needed, add 1-3 teaspoons of chicken broth to achieve desired consistency.
10. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a boil.
11. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and serve immediately.
